name: Gill's Print Shop — Back Room and Door
description: The rear of the shop smells of linseed oil and cold metal type; a single tallow candle on the compositing table throws more shadow than light. The back door opens onto a narrow alley that smells of low tide and horse.
atmosphericDetails: The press stands idle, its ink-black platen catching the candlelight like a dark mirror.
Somewhere above, a floorboard creaks — Benjamin moving in his room.
The back door has a broken latch that has never been repaired; it swings open at a touch.
